reason: Frontend spec index for the Vue/Tailwind app shell and feature component conventions.
Maps where feature components and shared frontend concerns belong in this repo.
Covers Vue Composition API patterns, icon buttons, and styling conventions used by the tab and settings components.
Defines how Pinia state and component-local UI state should be split for memo, file, and settings interactions.
Describes the shared type boundary for editor/file settings and other Vue components.
